## [00:00 - 00:57]

Hey there, Amanda here and I am a certified high performance coach and I've been a consultant for over 17 years and I'm so excited to teach coaching to those that are really excited to do it in a premium way. I love coaching. Coaching has changed my life so many ways, so many times and I love helping people who want to use coaching to change the lives of others and have a real impact. I really believe that you can build an amazing coaching business in balance and I know that you can because I have, I've got four kids and I have sold over $2 million in coaching and expert services with my entrepreneurial business over the last seven years and I cannot wait to teach you what I know about premium coaching.
